title: NIST Cybersecurity Framework v2.0 — Full Controls
description: Complete NIST CSF controls including IDENTIFY, PROTECT, DETECT, RESPOND, RECOVER functions mapped to Security Center features.

title: SOC 2 Type II — CC6 Control Suite
description: SOC 2 CC6 logical and physical access controls. Includes CC6.8 (change management) guardrail details.

title: RUN-SEC-042 — WAF Incident Triage and Response
description: Standard operating procedure for WAF alert triage: initial assessment, attack validation, IP investigation, and escalation criteria.

title: Change Management Policy — Security Operations
description: Policy governing all production security changes: approval workflow, rollback procedures, emergency change process, and audit requirements.

title: Trusted Networks and Monitoring IPs
description: Whitelist of corporate VPN ranges, CI/CD runner IPs, and Security Operations monitoring IPs. Used to filter false positives from attacker lists.

title: Asset Inventory — Production Topology
description: Topology map of production assets: web tier (2 ECS, ALB), database tier (1 ECS, primary), monitoring (1 ECS), and dev tier (1 ECS). Includes SOC 2 scope boundaries.
